'''鈭歯g-w-k''' ('''ngawaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeast|yeast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeast|yeast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-w-k
|-
! Lemma
| ngawaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngawakithi|ngawakithi]] || [[word:ngawakiji|ngawakiji]] || [[word:ngawakishi|ngawakishi]] || [[word:ngawaki|ngawaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawakuthuth|ngawakuthuth]] || [[word:ngawakujuj|ngawakujuj]] || [[word:ngawakushush|ngawakushush]] || [[word:ngawak|ngawak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawakuthu|ngawakuthu]] || [[word:ngawakuju|ngawakuju]] || [[word:ngawakushu|ngawakushu]] || [[word:ngawaku|ngawaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawakufuth|ngawakufuth]] || [[word:ngawakufuj|ngawakufuj]] || [[word:ngawakufush|ngawakufush]] || [[word:ngawakuf|ngawakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngawakethe|ngawakethe]] || [[word:ngawakeje|ngawakeje]] || [[word:ngawakeshe|ngawakeshe]] || [[word:ngawake|ngawake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawakothoth|ngawakothoth]] || [[word:ngawakojoj|ngawakojoj]] || [[word:ngawakoshosh|ngawakoshosh]] || [[word:ngawak|ngawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawakotho|ngawakotho]] || [[word:ngawakojo|ngawakojo]] || [[word:ngawakosho|ngawakosho]] || [[word:ngawako|ngawako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawakofoth|ngawakofoth]] || [[word:ngawakofoj|ngawakofoj]] || [[word:ngawakofosh|ngawakofosh]] || [[word:ngawakof|ngawakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngawak忙th忙|ngawak忙th忙]] || [[word:ngawak忙j忙|ngawak忙j忙]] || [[word:ngawak忙sh忙|ngawak忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngawak忙|ngawak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawakathath|ngawakathath]] || [[word:ngawakajaj|ngawakajaj]] || [[word:ngawakashash|ngawakashash]] || [[word:ngawak|ngawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawakatha|ngawakatha]] || [[word:ngawakaja|ngawakaja]] || [[word:ngawakasha|ngawakasha]] || [[word:ngawaka|ngawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawakafath|ngawakafath]] || [[word:ngawakafaj|ngawakafaj]] || [[word:ngawakafash|ngawakafash]] || [[word:ngawakaf|ngawakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngawakasha|ngawakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongawakasha|gongawakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingawakasha|gokingawakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngawakn眉sha|ngawakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongawaknkn眉sha|gongawaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingawakn眉sha|gokingawakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngawaksh毛sha|ngawaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongawaknksh毛sha|gongawaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingawaksh毛sha|gokingawaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngawakrosha|ngawakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongawaknkrosha|gongawaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingawakrosha|gokingawakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngawakmusha|ngawakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongawaknkmusha|gongawaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingawakmusha|gokingawakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngawaksherasha|ngawaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongawaknksherasha|gongawaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingawaksherasha|gokingawaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngawakngasha|ngawakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongawaknkngasha|gongawaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingawakngasha|gokingawakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngawakyasha|ngawakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongawaknkyasha|gongawaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingawakyasha|gokingawakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngawakyamasha|ngawakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongawaknkyamasha|gongawaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingawakyamasha|gokingawakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngawakn眉sh毛sha|ngawakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongawaknkn眉sh毛sha|gongawaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingawakn眉sh毛sha|gokingawakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngawakn眉rosha|ngawakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongawaknkn眉rosha|gongawaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingawakn眉rosha|gokingawakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngawakn眉musha|ngawakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongawaknkn眉musha|gongawaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingawakn眉musha|gokingawakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngawaksh毛n眉sha|ngawaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongawaknksh毛n眉sha|gongawaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingawaksh毛n眉sha|gokingawaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngawaksh毛rosha|ngawaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongawaknksh毛rosha|gongawaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingawaksh毛rosha|gokingawaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngawaksh毛musha|ngawaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongawaknksh毛musha|gongawaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingawaksh毛musha|gokingawaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngawakron眉sha|ngawakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongawaknkron眉sha|gongawaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingawakron眉sha|gokingawakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngawakrosh毛sha|ngawakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongawaknkrosh毛sha|gongawaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingawakrosh毛sha|gokingawakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngawakromusha|ngawakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongawaknkromusha|gongawaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingawakromusha|gokingawakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngawakmun眉sha|ngawakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongawaknkmun眉sha|gongawaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingawakmun眉sha|gokingawakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngawakmush毛sha|ngawakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongawaknkmush毛sha|gongawaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingawakmush毛sha|gokingawakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngawakmurosha|ngawakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongawaknkmurosha|gongawaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingawakmurosha|gokingawakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngawak|ngawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙w忙k|ng忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongawak|hongawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙w忙k|hong忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongawak|hohongawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙w忙k|hohong忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngawak|n眉ngawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙w忙k|n眉ng忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngawak|n眉n眉ngawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙w忙k|n眉n眉ng忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngawak|n茂ngawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙w忙k|n茂ng忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngawak|n茂n茂ngawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙w忙k|n茂n茂ng忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungawak|lungawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙w忙k|lung忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungawak|lulungawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙w忙k|lulung忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingawak|lingawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙w忙k|ling忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingawak|lilingawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙w忙k|liling忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongawak|kongawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙w忙k|kong忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongawak|kokongawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙w忙k|kokong忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengawak|kengawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙w忙k|keng忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengawak|kekengawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙w忙k|kekeng忙w忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
